_doc: scripts/route-recommendation.mjs reads this file; the skill body cites the script.
Each row maps a recommendation TYPE to a preferred-skill chain + inline fallback.
Patterns are case-insensitive regexes. First-match-wins; the script preserves row order on ties.

rows.name: Long-running / PRD-style autonomous execution
rows.fallback: Break into sub-recommendations, run proceed-with-the-recommendation recursively per sub-item.

rows.name: Implement feature / add capability
rows.fallback: Restate goal → list 3 design options → pick one → outline files to touch → build.

rows.name: Fix bug / investigate failure
rows.fallback: Hypothesis → add logs/tests → reproduce → smallest fix → verify with the failing repro.

rows.name: Write tests / add coverage
rows.fallback: RED (failing test) → GREEN (minimal code) → REFACTOR; one test, one behavior.

rows.name: Refactor / dead code cleanup
rows.fallback: Find dupes/unused exports, delete in place, re-run type check and smallest test.

rows.name: Security review / auth audit
rows.fallback: Scan for hardcoded secrets, unsanitized input, missing authz, SQL string concat, open CORS.

rows.name: Code review before merge
rows.fallback: Read diff top-to-bottom, flag CRITICAL / HIGH / MEDIUM.

rows.name: Verify before shipping
rows.fallback: Smallest check that proves correctness: typecheck + one test + one curl.

rows.name: Multiple independent tasks
rows.fallback: Launch N parallel `Agent` tool calls in one message; reconcile results after.

rows.name: Merge / close branch
rows.fallback: Verify clean tree, rebase on main, green CI, open PR with summary + test plan.

rows.name: Post-merge deploy receipt (auto-deploy projects)
rows.fallback: Confirm deployed SHA == merge SHA via provider CLI, GitHub Deployments API, or version-endpoint curl, plus a 200 from a documented healthcheck. INCOMPLETE receipt blocks the merge from being reported as done.

rows.name: Schedule a follow-up
rows.fallback: Tell user the exact action + cadence; if no scheduler, write a dated TODO/memory entry.

rows.name: Recurring poll / interval task
rows.fallback: Tell user the cadence + how to re-run manually.

rows.name: Library / API docs lookup
rows.fallback: Use `WebFetch` against the official docs URL, cite what changed.

rows.name: Frontend / UI design work
rows.fallback: Build smallest vertical slice first, verify in browser before styling.

rows.name: Settings / hooks / permission change
rows.fallback: Edit `~/.claude/settings.json` with a minimal patch; restart session.

rows.name: Commit and push
rows.fallback: `git add <specific files>` → commit with `type(scope): outcome` → push when asked.

rows.name: Continuous-improvement analysis / instinct update
rows.fallback: Run the 7-Laws Reflection block manually; append to `observations.jsonl`.

rows.name: Spec-first contract before code
rows.fallback: Restate the contract as a testable spec; downstream tests/code regenerate from it.

rows.name: Source-first reading before writing
rows.fallback: Read the existing implementation top-to-bottom first; never write blind.

rows.name: Curate context window before answering
rows.fallback: Trim irrelevant context; keep only the load-bearing files in scope.

rows.name: Slice atomic increment with safe deploy
rows.fallback: Smallest reviewable change; ship behind a flag if the full scope is too big.

rows.name: Refine vague request into ranked options
rows.fallback: Compress N ideas to 1 with explicit scoring criteria.

rows.name: Fan out N agents on isolated worktrees with shared contract
rows.fallback: Use the swarm contract: fixed roles + base ref + shared contract test; reconcile results after.

rows.name: Stream live observation of long agent runs
rows.fallback: Push-based event log; poll fallback if the MCP server is offline.

rows.name: Visual regression / browser-level diff
rows.fallback: Playwright screenshot diff against staging baseline.

rows.name: Multi-session retrospective across a sprint
rows.fallback: What worked / what failed / what to do differently / 3 ranked next moves.

rows.name: Long autonomous run with quality gates
rows.fallback: PRD-shaped autonomous loop with verify-between-iterations.

rows.name: Product-management work
rows.fallback: Keep the work shape (problem → user → goal → metric → scope; Given/When/Then per story; objective + 3-5 measurable KRs; we-believe / we'll-know hypothesis; TAM/SAM/SOM bottom-up) without depending on a specific routing target.
